name: 4th Street Auto
description_short: Buy Here Pay Here used car dealer in Louisville, KY offering in-house financing for vehicle purchases with flexible credit approval.
description_long:
4th Street Auto is a used car dealership located at 5109 Preston Highway in Louisville, Kentucky, specializing in Buy Here Pay Here financing. The dealership operates as both a vehicle seller and captive lender, allowing customers to secure both the vehicle and financing through a single transaction at their location.

The company offers an inventory of pre-owned vehicles ranging from $5,995 to $12,995, including sedans, trucks, SUVs, and crossovers from manufacturers like Toyota, Honda, Ford, Chevrolet, Nissan, and Lexus. Their primary service is providing in-house installment financing to customers regardless of credit history—specifically stating they serve individuals with good credit, bad credit, or no credit. Customers can apply for pre-qualification without providing SSN or DOB, with no reported impact to credit scores. The dealership also offers vehicle selection across multiple categories (Used Cars, Used Trucks, Used SUVs) with a featured inventory rotation.

What distinguishes 4th Street Auto is their Buy Here Pay Here model, which eliminates the need for third-party lender approval by financing directly. Their marketing emphasizes accessibility for subprime borrowers and convenience through single-location purchasing and financing. They provide text communication options and price-watch notifications to maintain customer engagement.

4th Street Auto functions as a vehicle retailer with integrated captive finance rather than a traditional personal loan lender. Customers are borrowing money specifically for vehicle purchases rather than unsecured personal loans. The company does not disclose terms, APR, payment structures, or loan duration on their website, making it impossible to assess actual borrowing costs or compare terms against alternatives.
pros: Accepts customers with bad credit, no credit, or good credit without discrimination
Pre-qualification available without SSN or DOB requirement
Single-location convenience for both vehicle selection and financing
Inventory spans multiple vehicle types (sedans, trucks, SUVs, crossovers)
Text-based communication option for customer convenience
No stated credit report impact from pre-qualification inquiry
cons: No APR, interest rate, or payment term information disclosed on website
No loan duration options or payment schedule details provided
Buy Here Pay Here models historically carry higher effective interest rates than traditional auto loans
No transparency on down payment requirements or fees
Limited vehicle age and mileage information available (mostly 2004–2016 model years)
best_for: Borrowers with poor or nonexistent credit history unable to qualify for traditional auto loans
Louisville, KY residents needing immediate vehicle financing without extensive third-party lender approval
Consumers seeking simple, single-location vehicle purchasing and financing
diagnosis: 4th Street Auto is best suited for subprime borrowers in the Louisville area who cannot qualify for traditional auto financing due to poor or no credit history, and who need a vehicle urgently. The main caveat is the complete absence of pricing transparency—APR, payment terms, down payments, and fees are not disclosed, making it impossible to assess actual borrowing costs before applying.
services: Buy Here Pay Here in-house vehicle financing
Used car sales and inventory browsing
